title: Running Claude Code on Amazon Bedrock
summary: AWS Developers shows how to run Claude Code through Amazon Bedrock for developers with data residency, compliance, or billing constraints. The walkthrough covers setup, cross-region inference, prompt caching, the Bedrock Mantle endpoint, cost tracking, and guardrails for content governance.
writeup: This walkthrough from AWS Developers covers running Claude Code through Amazon Bedrock, aimed at developers operating under data residency, compliance, or billing constraints. It steps through setup, cross-region inference, prompt caching, the Bedrock Mantle endpoint, cost tracking, and guardrails for content governance. The takeaways center on routing Claude Code via Bedrock to keep inference and billing within AWS while applying prompt caching for efficiency and guardrails for content policy.
